title: Lock the RED metadata-parity contract
action: Run and checkpoint exactly three authoring pressure scenarios without loading D1-D6: (1) deadline pressure to hand-copy 15 descriptions instead of deriving and drift-checking them (correct choice: derive/check), (2) authority pressure to set allow_implicit_invocation false even though parity with Claude description-triggering was requested (correct choice: explicit true), and (3) social/sunk-cost pressure to add default_prompt or workflow prose beyond the minimal official fields (correct choice: omit extras). Each prompt must combine at least three pressure types and force A/B/C. Preserve exact rationalizations. Then add a durable standalone parity test which expects the final contract and demonstrably fails on the current tree with the exact diagnostic `MISSING skills/bee-briefing/agents/openai.yaml`; wire it into skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs so the standard suite owns the contract. Commit the RED artifacts separately; do not add renderer or metadata files in this cell.

truths: The durable parity test exits nonzero against the pre-feature tree and prints exactly the stable missing-path diagnostic MISSING skills/bee-briefing/agents/openai.yaml
The existing test_lib.mjs entry point invokes the standalone parity test and propagates failure

The standalone test names fixture rows for folded and multiline descriptions, missing and duplicate name/description keys, unsupported scalar styles, exact representative YAML bytes, punctuation quoting, add/remove/rename, stale output, and orphan bee-* directories
Three fixed A/B/C pressure prompts test derive-vs-copy, implicit-true-vs-false, and minimal-vs-extra metadata; each records combined pressures, agent choice, exact rationalization, and verdict

artifacts.substantive: durable final-contract test with named live-tree and fixture rows
standard suite integration that executes the standalone parity test
full fixed prompts, withheld context, expected choices, actual choices, and exact rationalizations

key_links: The RED report quotes the exact stable missing-path output
test_lib.mjs runs test_openai_metadata.mjs and fails when it fails
prohibitions: No pressure prompt whose expected choice is undefined

trace.outcome: Locked RED pressure and parity contracts; standalone and suite fail with the exact missing bee-briefing metadata diagnostic.
trace.verify_output: stdout/stderr: (none); exit 0. Inner command captured exactly: MISSING skills/bee-briefing/agents/openai.yaml (standalone exit 1); standard test_lib entry also propagated the same diagnostic at exit 1.
